tools.name: search_articles
tools.description: Search Kettle Logic insight articles by title, slug or description.

tools.name: get_industry_overview
tools.description: Return a plain-text overview for an industry page (slug, e.g. "retail").

tools.name: list_articles
tools.description: List every Kettle Logic insight article (title, slug, description) as JSON.

tools.name: list_industries
tools.description: List the industries Kettle Logic publishes guidance for (name + slug) as JSON.

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Fetch one insight article as readable text (slug, e.g. "control-tower-operations").
